title: Seeing Through the Haze
summary: Visualizes how Singapore's haze episodes are shaped by air quality readings, regional fires, rainfall, wind, and climate patterns.

title: Singapore HDB Resale Flat Prices
summary: Visualizes Singapore HDB resale prices through location maps, room-type trends, price drivers, and recent transaction patterns.

title: The True Impacts of AI
summary: Visualizes the social, economic, and environmental impacts of artificial intelligence through an interactive scrollytelling report.

title: Sleep Signals
summary: Visualizes how student sleep patterns, daytime strain, and academic pressure relate to educational outcomes.

title: Patterns of Car Ownership in Singapore
summary: Visualizes how Singapore car ownership is shaped by policy signals, purchasing decisions, renewals, and de-registration.

title: Global Migration Trends
summary: Visualizes global migration patterns with maps, flow views, country classifications, and supporting trend charts.

title: Magnificent 7: Layoffs & Financial Impact
summary: Visualizes layoffs, stock performance, and capital expenditure across the Magnificent 7 technology companies from 2020 to 2025.

title: Singaporeans and Foreign Labour
summary: Visualizes Singapore labour and migration narratives through employment records, migration flows, and public sentiment analysis.

title: Walk2Ride: Sheltered Walking Network
summary: Visualizes MRT and LRT station shelter coverage, ridership, rainfall, nearby facilities, and station-level coverage mismatches.

title: Singapore Rail & Residents
summary: Visualizes how Singapore rail access and resident distribution co-evolved between 2000 and 2020.
